description: You are a sports nutritionist designing a meal plan. Obtain official nutritional data for three raw ingredients from the USDA FoodData Central database (fdc.nal.usda.gov) using only 'SR Legacy' or 'Foundation' data types. Extract the Protein value (g) per 100g for 'Chicken breast, raw', the Carbohydrate, by difference value (g) per 100g for 'Sweet potato, raw', and the Vitamin C, total ascorbic acid value (mg) per 100g for 'Broccoli, raw'. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_report.txt listing these values in a clear format (e.g., 'Item | Nutrient | Value') and download the full CSV or JSON data file for the Sweet Potato entry to /home/ga/Downloads/.
